reviews.comment:
Hoy lunes 29/11/2021, servicompras está abierto hasta las 22.00, estamos desde las 21.00 esperando, nos dicen que "probablemente esté en el baño, después de 23 minutos aparece la persona y abre la puerta... a lo mejor se estaba bañando... Quien sabe

(Translated by Google)
Today, Monday, November 29, 2021, Servicompras is open until 10:00 PM. We've been waiting since 9:00 PM. They tell us that "he's probably in the bathroom." After 23 minutes, the person appears and opens the door... maybe he was taking a shower... Who knows?
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHZ2J5X1V3EAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Good service. Cheap gasoline for Brazilians. Line of at least 1 hour, even in the early morning.

(Original)
Bom atendimento. Gasolina barata para brasileiros. Fila de no mínimo 1h, mesmo pela madrugada.
